recent.statement: Severe thunderstorms will hit the Gulf Coast region in the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: The only signal is a Severe Thunderstorm Warning near Midland/Odessa TX (32.9,-103.3), which is West Texas—not the Gulf Coast region—so no signal shows the forecast event occurring.

recent.statement: Severe thunderstorms will cause flash flooding in the Tallahassee area.
recent.evidence: No captured signal reports flash flooding or severe thunderstorms in the Tallahassee area during the window.

recent.statement: A significant market volatility event will occur within the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: VIX sits at 18.77 (below the ~20 calm threshold) with equity futures down only ~1%, indicating no significant market volatility event occurred within the window.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the Chicago area
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a severe thunderstorm warning for Chicago would certainly have been captured if it occurred.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the Dallas-Fort Worth metropolitan area in Texas.
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a severe thunderstorm warning for a major metro area would certainly have been recorded within its closed window.

recent.statement: Severe thunderstorms will cause power outages in the Midwest region
recent.evidence: The signals only show Severe Thunderstorm Warnings were issued, but none document that power outages actually occurred as the forecast required.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm will hit the city of Birmingham, Alabama within the next 24 hours.
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a severe thunderstorm hitting a major city would certainly have been captured within the closed window.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the Chicago area
recent.evidence: No captured signal reports a severe thunderstorm warning for the Chicago area within the forecast window.

recent.statement: A flash flood will occur in the Rio Grande Gorge near Taos, New Mexico
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a flash flood of this nature would have been recorded if it occurred within the window.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm will hit the city of Albuquerque, New Mexico
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a severe thunderstorm hitting a major city would certainly have been captured, yet none shows it.

recent.statement: A category 2 cyclone will make landfall in Mexico within the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: The only signal shows cyclone ELIDA-26 at Tropical Storm level with zero population affected by Category 1 or higher winds, far short of a Category 2 landfall in Mexico.

recent.statement: A Category 1 tropical cyclone will make landfall in Mexico
recent.evidence: Signal S1 shows cyclone ELIDA-26 with zero population affected by Category 1 winds and an offshore location, indicating no Category 1 landfall in Mexico occurred within the window.
